name: Three Sisters Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 small can Frozen orange juice concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Mix all ingredients except milk and pour into a freezer can.
3. Add milk to fill the freezer 2/3 full.
Freezing Instructions:
1. Assemble the freezer by pouring ice until it is about 3 inches deep.
2. Sprinkle half a cup of rock salt around the can.
3. Layer ice/salt until just above the lid of the can.
4. If too much salt is added, the ice cream may freeze too fast around the edges of the can.
5. Turn off the paddle and allow the mixture to become stiff.
6. Open the lid carefully, avoiding contact with the salt.
7. Remove the paddle and cover the can with Glad Wrap.
8. Replace the lid and place a cork in the hole.
9. Pour out some water from the side of the ice cream freezer.
10. Take out some ice, add more salt, and replace it back into the freezer.
11. Cover the ice cream freezer with several layers of newspapers and a heavy blanket.
12. Allow to set for 30-45 minutes before serving.
Store leftover ice cream in an air-tight container and freeze until ready to serve. This recipe freezes well and remains smooth after freezing.
